items.headline: Timothée Chalamet leads NBA playoffs celebrity sightings
items.description: Celebrities have been out in style courtside at the NBA playoffs.

items.headline: 2026 NBA playoffs: Schedule and how to watch
items.description: It's time for the 2026 NBA playoffs! Can the Oklahoma City Thunder go back-to-back? Here's how to catch games on ABC and the ESPN App.

items.headline: Matarazzo celebrates Real Sociedad Copa title: 'Just the beginning'
items.description: More than 100,000 fans gathered in the streets of San Sebastian, Spain, on Monday to celebrate Real Sociedad's Copa del Rey win over the weekend -- a first major trophy for the Basque team since 2021.

items.headline: Seahawks look to move down in NFL draft, willing to deal in NFC West
items.description: The Super Bowl champion Seahawks are looking to trade down in this year's NFL draft -- "it's no secret with us," general manager John Schneider said Monday -- and are not opposed to making deals within their division.

items.headline: Counsell: MLB rule in place for Ohtani, Dodgers 'bizarre'
items.description: Chicago Cubs manager Craig Counsell thinks that a Major League Baseball rule that allows the Los Angeles Dodgers to carry 14 pitchers because of Shohei Ohtani is "bizarre," adding that the defending National League MVP is getting "special consideration."

items.headline: CEO: PGA Tour will consider paths to bring back LIV golfers
items.description: The PGA Tour will consider additional pathways to bring back LIV Golf League players who might want to return to the circuit, CEO Brian Rolapp said Monday.

items.headline: Alejandro Garnacho's attitude at Man United a 'disgrace' - Nicky Butt
items.description: Former Manchester United midfielder Nicky Butt has branded Alejandro Garnacho's attitude during his time at Manchester United a "disgrace"

items.headline: Fantasy Baseball Reliever Depth Chart
items.description: Our updated reliever depth chart displays the closer hierarchy for each team, as well as the fatigue factor in each MLB bullpen.

items.headline: Mariners put Brendan Donovan on 10-day IL, add Will Wilson
items.description: Mariners third baseman Brendan Donovan was placed on the 10-day injured list retroactive to Saturday with a left groin muscle strain.

items.headline: Raptors' Immanuel Quickley (hamstring) out for Game 2 vs. Cavs
items.description: Raptors guard Immanuel Quickley missed Game 2 of Toronto's first-round playoff series against the Cavs because of a right hamstring strain.

items.headline: Hawaii's Sentry, Sony Open off PGA Tour schedule in 2027
items.description: The PGA Tour will not be in Hawaii in 2027 for the first time in 56 years as it moves toward a revamped schedule that no longer will start the season in the middle of the Pacific Ocean.

items.headline: NFL depth charts for all 32 teams
items.description: Here are the latest NFL depth charts for all 32 teams.

items.headline: Fantasy baseball news: Edwin Diaz placed on IL; Who do Dodgers turn to next?
items.description: All of the important fantasy spin and actionable takeaways resulting from the latest baseball news.

items.headline: Dodgers' Edwin Diaz out till 'second half' for elbow surgery
items.description: Los Angeles Dodgers closer Edwin Diaz is scheduled to undergo surgery Wednesday to remove loose bodies in his right elbow, the team announced Monday, and the expectation is that he could miss around three months, a source told ESPN's Alden Gonzalez.

items.headline: Judging the biggest AFL overreactions after Round 6
items.description: The Bulldogs' premiership hopes are in tatters after Sam Darcy's ACL injury, right? Plus, the AFL missed the mark with its Friday night double-headers experiment. It's time to react to the week's big talking points.
